title: Utopia (femboy Edition)
description: This is the official server modpack for Utopia server(still under construction) Feel free to use it! We dont have a Discord yet or a time frame when the server will start but feel free to stick around :3 This modpack was inspired by the Aged modpack
body:
# This is the official server modpack for Utopia server(still under construction)!
Feel free to use it while we prepare for launch! 
We have a Discord server coming soon, and you can follow our progress and connect with other fellow femboys there. 

What's New?
This update brings over 60+ new mods and a ton of optimizations to make your modded experience even better!
- **Choose Your Destiny:** Embrace your inner adventurer with the Origins mod!  Become
  interlinked twinborn with your friend, or explore countless other possibilities with
  numerous other origins to choose from.
- **Christmas Cheer:** Cozy up with festive Christmas music as you build your dream world.
- **Performance Boost:** Enjoy a smoother experience, even on lower-end PCs, thanks to
  extensive optimization efforts.
- **Bug Fixes Galore!:** We've squashed numerous bugs based on your feedback! Report any new
  issues on our Github page, accessible from the main menu.
- **Holiday Spirit:** Decorate your world with festive Christmas decorations.
- **Modded Harmony:** We've fine-tuned mod configurations for optimal gameplay.
- **Looking Ahead:**
  Get ready for a massive content update in January with custom quests and even more origin
  options to choose from!

Thank you for your patience and support! We can't wait to see you in the UtopiaMC Discord soon! :3

**Report Bugs:**
Github Issue [Link](https://github.com/TheSilentD3ath/UtopiaMC-Modpack/issues/new)

Q&A
- **I have bad performance and have 8-16GB ram minimum**
(Any Gen RTX graphics card is required for all performance boost mods to work)

**Inspiration and Resources:**
This modpack was inspired by the Aged modpack. Check it out!
- **Resourcepack:** Stay True
The resourcepack Stay true source:
[stay true source](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)
